message:
fix(ci): resolve macOS test failures (symlinks, arch, signal codes)

- extensions_js.rs: Use cfg!(target_arch) for process.arch test instead
  of hardcoding "x64" (macOS CI is arm64)
- extensions_js.rs: Canonicalize roots in resolve_extension_root_for_base
  to handle macOS /var → /private/var symlinks
- package_manager.rs: Compare canonicalized dir with root in
  prune_empty_git_parents to avoid removing root on macOS
- extensions.rs: Allow negative exit codes in streaming timeout test
  (killed processes return -signal, e.g. -9 for SIGKILL)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
